name: Barracks
notes: Shared building type between Capital and Treehouse (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md) — same definition, base eligibility is authored on each BaseDef's buildableBuildings list, not here. Max level is derived as length(productionUpgradeLevels) = 5, one per troop in the roster (game-design/08-troop-roster.md): Rifleman, Grenadier, Flamethrower, Sniper, Shielder, in that unlock order. HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
